meaning: n.[数、物]锥形物,圆锥体,(松树的)球果vt.使成锥形
examples: In one week he was the owner of a cone five hundred feet high.
French fries, eaten from a paper cone are the Belgian's favourite food.
The classic cone shapes of a Fuji or Kilimanjaro are created when erupting magma piles up.
He reckons that some 20% of the city's middle class now lives in the northern cone.
Gen Cone said a graduation ceremony for a group of soldiers was taking place nearby.
